status.readyDesc: Click start to wait for connections.

notify.usbDisconnected: USB disconnected. Please reconnect the cable and click Connect.

ipSelector.switchConfirmMessage: Switching the network interface will restart the connection. Continue?

deviceSelector.title: Select USB Device
deviceSelector.desc: Multiple devices detected. Please select a device to connect:

customCss.title: Custom CSS
customCss.desc: Enter custom CSS code to style the application globally.

customColor.title: Custom Color
customColor.autoManaged: Saturation and Lightness are automatically managed to maintain a premium tonal aesthetic.

pocketMode.title: Pocket Mode
pocketMode.desc: Compact horizontal bar layout, other controls moved to popup menu

vbcable.title: VB-Cable Forwarding
vbcable.desc: To route audio to other applications (like OBS or Discord), you need to install VB-Audio Virtual Cable.

audioOutput.title: Output Device
audioOutput.desc: Where should the microphone audio be played?
audioOutput.routingActive: VB-CABLE routing is active. Audio will be forwarded to "CABLE Output".

plugins.portedDesc: This section is being ported from the KMP version.

webPort.title: Web Port
webPort.webOnly: Switch to Web connection mode to configure this setting.

about.introText: MicYou is an open source microphone tool that turns your Android device into a high-quality microphone for your computer. It supports Wi-Fi and USB connections, providing low-latency audio transmission.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.disclaimer: Only showing personal sponsorships to the project creator LanRhyme on Aifadian.

update.available:
New version available: {version}
Do you want to open the release page?
update.latest: You are using the latest version.

udpWarning.title: Firewall Blocked UDP Connection
udpWarning.desc:
The mobile app connected successfully, but the PC didn't receive any UDP audio data. This is usually because Windows Firewall is blocking the UDP port ({port}).

Please allow network access for MicYou in your firewall, or try running the app as Administrator.

closeConfirm.title: Close MicYou
closeConfirm.message: What would you like to do?

closeBehavior.title: On Window Close
closeBehavior.desc: What should happen when you close the main window?

startMinimized.title: Start Minimized
startMinimized.desc: Launch the app hidden in the system tray instead of opening the window.

autostart.title: Run at Startup
autostart.desc: Automatically start MicYou when you log in to your computer.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Show system notifications when device connects or disconnects.

autoStream.title: Auto Stream
autoStream.desc: Automatically start streaming when the app launches.

networkTimeout.title: Connection Timeout
networkTimeout.message: Connection timed out. Please check your network connection and target device status.

portInUse.title: Port Already in Use
portInUse.message: Port {port} is already in use by another application. Please choose a different port or close the conflicting application.

connectionRefused.title: Connection Refused
connectionRefused.message: Connection was refused. The target device may not be running MicYou or is not listening on the specified port.
connectionRefused.wifiMessage: Connection to {ip} was refused. Please ensure the desktop server is running and configured with the same port.

networkUnreachable.title: Network Unreachable
networkUnreachable.message: Cannot reach IP address: {ip}. Please verify the IP address and ensure both devices are on the same network.

firewallBlocked.title: Firewall Blocked
firewallBlocked.message: Port {port} is blocked by Windows Firewall. Please add a firewall rule or run the application as administrator.

permissionDenied.title: Permission Denied
permissionDenied.message: Insufficient permissions to perform this operation. Please run the application as administrator.

deviceNotFound.title: Device Not Found
deviceNotFound.message: The specified device was not found. Please check your network connection.

usbConnectionFailed.title: USB Connection Failed
usbConnectionFailed.message: USB connection failed. Please check your USB cable and ensure USB debugging is enabled on your Android device.

adbCommandFailed.title: ADB Command Failed
adbCommandFailed.message: ADB command execution failed. Please ensure ADB is installed and USB debugging is enabled.

handshakeFailed.title: Handshake Failed
handshakeFailed.message: Handshake failed with the target device. This may indicate a version mismatch or protocol error.

protocolError.title: Protocol Error
protocolError.message: A protocol error occurred during communication. Please restart both applications.

audioDevice.title: Audio Device Error
audioDevice.message: Audio device error. Please check your audio device settings and restart the application.

audioFormat.title: Audio Format Error
audioFormat.message: Unsupported audio format. Please try different audio settings or use auto-configuration.

versionMismatch.title: Version Mismatch
versionMismatch.message: Version mismatch detected. Please ensure both devices are running the same version of MicYou.

adminPrivilege.title: Administrator Privilege Required
adminPrivilege.message: This operation requires administrator privileges. Please restart the application as administrator.

udpPortBlocked.title: UDP Port Blocked
udpPortBlocked.message: UDP audio port {port} is blocked by firewall. Audio transmission requires both TCP and UDP ports to be accessible. Please add a firewall rule for the UDP port or run the application as administrator.

suggestion.checkNetwork: Check your Wi-Fi or network connection
suggestion.checkTargetRunning: Ensure the target device is running MicYou server
suggestion.tryDifferentPort: Try using a different port number
suggestion.changePort: Change the port number in settings
suggestion.checkOtherApps: Check if other applications are using this port
suggestion.checkServerRunning: Verify the desktop server is running and ready
suggestion.checkWifiConnected: Ensure both devices are connected to the same Wi-Fi network
suggestion.checkAntivirus: Check antivirus or security software settings
suggestion.enableUsbDebugging: Enable USB debugging in Android developer options
suggestion.checkAdbInstalled: Ensure ADB is installed on your computer
suggestion.versionMatch: Ensure both devices use the same MicYou version
suggestion.checkAudioDevice: Check audio device permissions and availability
suggestion.checkLogs: Check application logs for detailed error information

onboarding.title: Welcome to MicYou
onboarding.desc: This app turns your Android device into a high-quality microphone for your computer via Wi-Fi or USB.
onboarding.step1Desc: Download and install MicYou desktop app on your computer
onboarding.step2WifiDesc: Wi-Fi: Enter computer IP address in the app
onboarding.step2UsbDesc: USB: Connect via USB cable and run ADB command
onboarding.step3Desc: Click Start button to begin audio streaming
onboarding.step4Desc: Select VB-Cable as input device in your recording software
onboarding.gotIt: I know how to use it
onboarding.completeDesc: You're all set! You can now start using MicYou.

vbcableDetect.title: VB-Cable Driver Required
vbcableDetect.message: VB-Cable driver is required for MicYou to function as a virtual microphone on Windows. Would you like to install it automatically?

vbcableInstall.adminRequired: Administrator privileges required. Please approve the UAC prompt.
vbcableInstall.timeout: Installation timed out. Please try again.
